---
title: "About Me"
about:
  template: solana
  image: ./images/profile.png
  image-width: 15em
toc: true
toc-title: "Content"
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

I am a professional passionate about the intersection between engineering and data science. Currently, I am pursuing a **Master's Degree in Data Science** at the Universidad de Sonora, focusing on Natural Language Processing (NLP) and the development of Large Language Models (LLMs).

My experience combines the analytical foundation of chemical engineering with modern software development and data analysis tools.

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Education

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Master's Degree in Data Science]{.cv-title} | Universidad de Sonora
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
August 2023 - Present
:::
Focus on Python, SQL, NoSQL databases, ETL processes, machine learning models, neural networks, NLP, and time series analysis.
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Bachelor's Degree in Chemical Engineering]{.cv-title} | Universidad de Sonora
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
August 2018 - June 2023
:::
Skills in process simulation and optimization (MATLAB, ASPEN HYSYS).
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Professional Experience

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Scientist]{.cv-title} | CT Internacional
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
February 2025 - Present
:::
Development of an agentic model for advanced hardware recommendations and automated sales. Implementation of RAG architecture with LangChain and OpenAI for dynamic inventory, pricing, and technical guide queries.
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Scientist]{.cv-title} | DARIG – Consultores (Salsas Castillo)
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
March 2025 - Feb 2026
:::
Implementation of an MCP (Model Context Protocol) for sales analysis and business KPIs. Design of function-calling agents (SQL) integrated into Telegram for automated PDF report generation.
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Engineer]{.cv-title} | DARIG – Consultores (Frutal)
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
October 2025 - Feb 2026
:::
Development of Windows/Linux ETL pipelines for migrating legacy databases (HFSQL) to Data Lakes in Parquet format using Podman containers.
:::

:::{.cv-entry}
:::{.cv-header}
[Data Scientist]{.cv-title} | National Energy Control Center (CENACE)
:::
:::{.cv-subtitle}
May 2024 - Feb 2025
:::
Development of chatbots based on RAG systems to assist IT engineers. Integration of ticket classification systems to improve response efficiency.
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Technical Skills

**Languages**

<span class="badge bg-primary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">SQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">NoSQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">JavaScript</span>

**AI & Data Science**

<span class="badge bg-success">LangChain</span>
<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Ollama</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">Hugging Face</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Scikit-learn</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">Pandas</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">NumPy</span>
<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">Matplotlib</span>
<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Seaborn</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">RAG</span>
<span class="badge bg-primary">MCP</span>

**Databases**

<span class="badge bg-danger">PostgreSQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-danger">MySQL</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">MongoDB</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">FAISS</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">Redis</span>
<span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">HFSQL</span>

**Development & DevOps**

<span class="badge bg-info text-dark">FastAPI</span>
<span class="badge bg-dark">Docker/Podman</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Git/GitHub</span>
<span class="badge bg-primary">DagsHub</span>

**Certifications**

<span class="badge bg-success">Data Analysis – DataCamp</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">ML Scientist in Python – DataCamp</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">Data Science with Python – DataCamp</span>

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Languages

:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-6}
🇲🇽 **Spanish** — Native

🇺🇸 **English** — Fluent

🇵🇹 **Portuguese** — Fluent
:::

:::{.g-col-6}
🇫🇷 **French** — Fluent

🇯🇵 **Japanese** — Intermediate

🇩🇪 **German** — Intermediate
:::

:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: justify"}

## Interests

I am passionate about continuous learning of languages and cultures — I currently speak 6 languages. I enjoy dancing and traveling, and I am deeply motivated by applying technology to solve real business problems through data and artificial intelligence.

:::
